arts.ttl: Bayern Munich and Man Utd, PSG-linked Player Have Positive Extension Talks as Barça, Liverpool circle
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala’s contract runs until 2026, and now top European clubs are interested in the 21-year-old. The German side have begun extension talks with the player as they look to fend off suitors. arts.ttl: PSG Joins Barcelona, Manchester United in Worrying Goal Scoring Stat
arts.sum: Over the last two matches, Paris Saint-Germain’s inability to finish their scoring chances has entered the spotlight. Moreover, the Parisians are in an unflattering stat that further emphasizes their issue. arts.ttl: Arsenal’s Impressive Stat Poses Threat to PSG Ahead of Champions League Match
arts.sum: Arsenal and Paris Saint-Germain are gearing up for a clash next week on Matchday 2 of the UEFA Champions League, and the Gunners have a stat that might give PSG some cause for concern.
